title: Isla's Sleepy Treasure Hunt
synopsis: Little Isla discovers a magical treasure map in her bedroom and embarks on a gentle nighttime adventure through her house, finding cozy treasures that lead her to the sweetest treasure of all - a peaceful night's sleep.

pages.text: Isla found something special under her pillow. It was a golden treasure map with dotted lines and a big red X! "What an adventure!" she whispered. The map showed her very own house, but it looked magical with swirly lines and sparkles. Isla's eyes grew wide with wonder. She decided to follow the treasure map right now, even though it was almost bedtime.

illustration.description: A young girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes sits on her bed holding an aged parchment treasure map with compass roses and dotted trails, surrounded by sepia tones and jewel accents in treasure map style
illustration.alt: Isla discovering a magical treasure map on her bed

pages.text: Isla tiptoed out of her room, following the dotted trail on her map. First, it led her to the kitchen where she found a small treasure - her favorite teddy bear waiting by the cookie jar! Next, the map showed arrows pointing to the living room. There she discovered another treasure - her cozy blanket folded neatly on the sofa. "This is the best treasure hunt ever!" Isla giggled softly, hugging her teddy tight.

illustration.description: A treasure map style illustration showing a young girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes walking through a house following dotted trails, holding a teddy bear, with aged parchment background and compass roses marking her path
illustration.alt: Isla following the treasure map through her house

pages.text: The map led Isla back to her bedroom, where the big red X marked her own bed! She climbed in with her teddy and blanket. Suddenly, Mama appeared with warm milk and a gentle kiss. "The greatest treasure," Mama whispered, "is a good night's sleep." Isla smiled and closed her bright green eyes. She had found the most wonderful treasure of all - sweet dreams in her cozy bed. The magic map glowed softly as she drifted off to sleep.

illustration.description: A peaceful bedroom scene in treasure map style with aged parchment tones, showing a young girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes tucked into bed with a teddy bear, while her mother sits beside her, compass roses and jewel accents decorating the borders
illustration.alt: Isla finding the greatest treasure - bedtime with Mama

metadata.illustrationStyle: treasure map style, aged parchment, compass roses, dotted trails, sepia tones, jewel accents, bold explorers, adventure cartography, hand-drawn maps

questions.question: Where did Isla find the treasure map?
questions.explanation: Isla found the golden treasure map under her pillow when she was getting ready for bed.

questions.question: What was the first treasure Isla found?
questions.explanation: Following the map to the kitchen, Isla found her favorite teddy bear waiting by the cookie jar.

questions.question: Where was the big red X on the map?
questions.explanation: The big red X marked Isla's own bed, showing her that bedtime was the final destination.

questions.question: What did Mama say was the greatest treasure?
questions.explanation: Mama told Isla that the greatest treasure is a good night's sleep in her cozy bed.
